name: subagent-event

defaults.event_policy: Emit an outbox-event-shaped JSON object for the coordinator; do not call transport tools directly.
defaults.output_format: JSON object with type, delivery, summary, payload, confidence, and next_action.

template: pi -p --model {model} --thinking {thinking} {tools?--tools:--no-tools} {tools} Create an event-shaped record. Event type: {event_type}. Delivery: {delivery}. Event policy: {event_policy}. Payload: {payload}. Output format: {output_format}
